label: 场转采样点
description: 从标量场（field，每格一个数值）按阈值采样出采样点列表：遍历输入 field 的所有格（行优先，r 外层、c 内层），凡是「值 > threshold」（严格大于）的格，各自生成一张与输入同尺寸、仅该格=1 其余=0 的单点 0/1 网格，所有这些单点网格按行优先顺序组成一个列表（DataTree）输出。每张输出网格恰好一个 1，列表长度等于超阈值的格数；没有任何格超阈值时输出空列表。常用于把 field_noise / field_distance 等连续标量场离散化成一组可逐点处理的采样点。
description-en: Samples a list of points from a scalar field (a field — one value per cell) by threshold: iterate all cells of the input field in row-major order (r outer, c inner); for every cell whose value is strictly greater than threshold, emit a single-point 0/1 grid matching the input size (only that cell = 1, the rest = 0). All such single-point grids form a list (DataTree) in row-major order. Each output grid has exactly one 1; the list length equals the number of cells above the threshold; an empty list is output when no cell exceeds the threshold. Useful for discretizing continuous scalar fields (e.g. field_noise / field_distance) into a set of per-point samples.
icon: 深色网格背景上，从连续明暗的标量场里挑出几个分散的亮绿单点高亮显示，体现按阈值采样出离散点，扁平插画风格，简洁小图标，主色2种。

inputs.name: field
inputs.label: 输入标量场
inputs.description: 输入标量场/网格（number[][]），每格一个连续数值。按阈值在其上采样点。
inputs.description-en: Input scalar field / grid (number[][]), one continuous value per cell. Points are sampled on it by threshold.

inputs.name: threshold
inputs.label: 阈值
inputs.description: 采样阈值。只有「值 > threshold」（严格大于）的格会被采为一个点，等于阈值的格不被选中。
inputs.description-en: Sampling threshold. Only cells whose value is strictly greater than threshold are sampled as a point; cells equal to the threshold are not selected.

outputs.name: points
outputs.label: 采样点列表
outputs.description: 采样点列表（grid[]）：每个「field 值 > threshold」的格产生一张与输入同尺寸的 0/1 网格（仅该格=1，其余=0），行优先顺序。列表长度=超阈值格数；无超阈值时为空列表。
outputs.description-en: List of sampled points (grid[]): each cell whose field value > threshold yields a 0/1 grid matching the input size (only that cell = 1, the rest = 0), in row-major order. List length equals the number of cells above the threshold; an empty list when none exceed it.

outputs.name: count
outputs.label: 采样点数
outputs.description: 超阈值的格数，即 points 列表的长度（采样到的点个数）。
outputs.description-en: Number of cells above the threshold, i.e. the length of the points list (count of sampled points).
